_comment: Purview DLP policy template. Detects PII being typed/pasted into GenAI apps in browser. Ships in 'TestWithoutNotifications' simulation mode — change to 'Enable' only after CISO sign-off.
name: KLZ — Block PII to GenAI (SIMULATION)
description: Detects credit card numbers, SSNs, and customer PII patterns being sent to unsanctioned generative AI services via Edge/Chrome with Purview client.

actions.policyTip: KLZ: pasting customer PII into unsanctioned AI services is not allowed.

actions._simulationNote: Block action runs in simulation under TestWithoutNotifications — counts but does not stop the user.
